prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次约5309→6923→9656→11188→11248，整体呈持续后移趋势，近4年累计后移约5939名；2025年基准约11248名，较2024年仅微增60名，后移速度明显放缓；本省物理类计划2021年55人、2022年52人、2023年50人、2024年49人、2025年42人，近年持续缩招；2026年招生计划文件缺失。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜排名2021年44名、2022年44名、2023年46名、2024年44名、2025年45名、2026年42名，排名稳中有升，属全国顶尖财经类院校；2023年声誉评价偏负面，主要因新闻传播学类专业投档位次大幅下滑；抖音热度总排名第97位（评价一般），2023年单年排名第47位（较热），近年短视频曝光度一般；未见明显投档断档记录；应用经济学A、理论经济学A-，在财经类院校中学科实力突出，与该校金融学类、财政学类、经济学类等招生专业高度关联。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 金融/财经/经济类专业热度2021年推荐（72.42）→2022年分化观望（60.96，明显降温）→2023年分化观望（61.15）→2024年分化观望（65.49，小幅升温），整体呈分化观望态势，报考意愿趋于理性；本省物理类考生2021年16.6万→2025年26.1万→2026年估算约38.6万，考生规模持续大幅增长，竞争显著加剧；中央财经大学位于北京，属跨省招生。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年本省物理类考生规模大幅增长（竞争加剧）以及近年招生计划持续缩招（竞争缓解）的双向作用，在考生规模增长的主导影响下，预计2026年物理类最低位次在2025年基准11248名基础上继续小幅后移；预测最低位次约11448名，区间10948–11948名。

一档（最难进）

- 经济学（数理经济与数理金融）
- 财政学类（含财政学、税收学等）
- 精算学
- 经济学类（经济学、国民经济管理）
- 工商管理类（商学院）。

三档（相对好进）

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间10948–11948名内，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档王牌专业冲刺、三档专业保底；位次明显优于区间下限（如10948名以内）可重点冲刺金融科技、大数据管理与应用等一档专业；位次接近区间上限（11948名附近）应以三档专业为主，谨慎选择一档。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category dropped from approximately 5309 to 6923 to 9656 to 11188 to 11248, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 5939 places in the past 4 years; the 2025 baseline is about 11248, only a slight increase of 60 places compared to 2024, indicating a significant slowdown in the backward shift; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 55 in 2021, 52 in 2022, 50 in 2023, 49 in 2024, and 42 in 2025, showing continuous contraction in recent years; the 2026 enrollment plan document is missing.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; on the Soft Science main ranking, it ranked 44th in 2021, 44th in 2022, 46th in 2023, 44th in 2024, 45th in 2025, and 42nd in 2026, showing a stable and slightly rising trend, belonging to the top national finance and economics institutions; in 2023, the reputation evaluation was relatively negative, mainly due to a significant decline in the admission ranking of Journalism and Communication majors; on Douyin, its overall popularity ranked 97th (average evaluation), and in 2023 alone it ranked 47th (relatively hot), with generally average short video exposure in recent years; no obvious admission gaps were recorded; Applied Economics is rated A, Theoretical Economics A-, showing outstanding disciplinary strength among finance and economics institutions, highly correlated with its enrollment majors such as Finance, Public Finance, and Economics.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The popularity of Finance/Accounting/Economics majors was recommended in 2021 (72.42), then showed divergence and wait-and-see in 2022 (60.96, significant cooling), divergence and wait-and-see in 2023 (61.15), and divergence and wait-and-see in 2024 (65.49, slight warming), overall showing a divergence and wait-and-see trend, with application intentions becoming more rational; the number of provincial Physics Category examinees grew from 166,000 in 2021 to 261,000 in 2025, and is estimated to be about 386,000 in 2026, with a continuous and significant increase in examinee scale, leading to intensified competition; Central University of Finance and Economics is located in Beijing, involving cross-provincial enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the significant increase in the number of provincial Physics Category examinees in 2026 (intensified competition), and the continuous contraction of enrollment plans in recent years (eased competition), under the dominant influence of the increase in examinee scale, it is expected that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will continue to shift slightly backward from the 2025 baseline of 11248; the predicted minimum ranking is about 11448, with a range of 10948 to 11948.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Financial Technology (Joint Bachelor's Degree Program with Beihang University)
- Big Data Management and Application (Xu Guozhi Big Data Elite Class)
- Finance (Financial Engineering, Financial Technology)
- Taxation (Joint Bachelor's Degree Program with Beijing Institute of Technology).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Finance (Including Joint Bachelor's Degree Program with Beijing Foreign Studies University)
- Business Administration (Accounting, Financial Management) (School of Accounting)
- Finance (International Finance and Corporate Finance)
- Economics (Mathematical Economics and Mathematical Finance)
- Public Finance (Including Public Finance, Taxation, etc.)
- Actuarial Science
- Economics (Economics, National Economic Management)
- Business Administration (School of Business).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Investment (Including Dual Bachelor's Degree Program)
- Economics and Trade
- Computer Science (Computer Science and Technology, Information Security, etc.)
- Statistics
- Management Science and Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 10948 to 11948, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 flagship majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options; if the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 10948), you can focus on aiming for Tier 1 majors such as Financial Technology and Big Data Management and Application; if the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 11948), you should mainly consider Tier 3 majors and be cautious with Tier 1 choices.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 1092 → 1385 → 1604 → 1181 → 1416, with significant fluctuations. In 2024, it rebounded to 1181, but in 2025 it moved back to 1416; the baseline for 2025 is about 1416. The provincial enrollment plan for History Category was 20 in 2021, 23 in 2022, 24 in 2023, 24 in 2024, and 23 in 2025, remaining largely stable in recent years. The 2026 enrollment plan document is missing.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked 42nd in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, steadily rising in recent years, belonging to the top national finance and economics institutions. In 2023, reputation evaluation was somewhat negative, mainly due to a significant decline in the application ranking for Journalism and Communication majors. Douyin popularity ranking is 97th (average evaluation), with generally low short video exposure in recent years. No obvious application gaps were recorded. Applied Economics is rated A, Theoretical Economics A-, highly correlated with the university's History Category enrollment majors such as Economics, Finance and Taxation, and Business Administration.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popularity of finance/economics/business majors is diverging and cautious, with applications becoming more rational. The number of provincial History Category examinees increased from 95,000 in 2021 to 97,000 in 2025, and is estimated to be about 135,000 in 2026, showing significant growth and intensified competition. Central University of Finance and Economics is located in Beijing, involving cross-provincial enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant fluctuations in historical rankings, the growth in the number of provincial History Category examinees in 2026 (intensified competition), and the largely stable enrollment plan, it is predicted that the minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 will slightly move back from the 2025 baseline of 1416. The predicted minimum ranking is about 1476, with a range of 1255–1697.

If your ranking is significantly better than the lower bound (e.g., within 1255), you can focus on applying for Tier 1 majors such as Finance and Accounting. If your ranking is near the upper bound (around 1697), you should mainly consider Tier 3 majors.
